texto: We’re all human, we should be respectful of others, and tolerant with each other. This matters more than whether we eat the same food or speak the same language. The skin colour does not make us different. It’s easier to be with people that are different to you but have the same values than to be with people who appear similar to you but have different values.” Sophie
explicacao: Orientação direta de Angela Nicoara sobre temas ligados a amor. A afirmação “We’re all human, we should be respectful of others, and tolerant with each other. This matters mo…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, culture-identity, love-story, útil em momentos de love-story.
